overview: An interactive AI agent orchestration flow diagram that visualizes how queries route through an orchestrator to specialized agents (Travel, Trading, General) and their real external API tools. Features animated query flows, real data from Booking.com, Binance and web search, plus per-agent query history panels.
features: Interactive flow diagram with animated query paths
Orchestrator node that routes queries to specialized agents
Travel agent with real Booking.com and Google Flights integration
Trading monitor with live Binance market data
General agent with web search capability
Dark theme with color-coded agent nodes
